t.name: Survey: back to form view

div.class: alert alert-info p-2 border-0 rounded-0 d-print-none css_editable_mode_hidden mb-0 text-center
div.p: This is a Test Survey Entry.

div.class: alert alert-warning p-2 border-0 rounded-0 d-print-none css_editable_mode_hidden mb-0 text-center

t.div: It is currently not possible to pass this assessment because no question is configured to give any points.
